title: Success Story: Swift NIW Success! NAILG Helped a Physician Scientist from China Get Approved via Premium Processing
content:
Client’s Testimonial:
“I am writing to express my sincere gratitude and admiration for the outstanding service you provided during my NIW application process. Collaborating with your team was a seamless and enjoyable experience. You were always approachable, responsive, and willing to go the extra mile to accommodate my needs. Your clear communication and willingness to explain complex legal concepts in an understandable manner made the entire process less daunting. Thank you for making this a truly wonderful experience!”
On March 13 th , 2025, we received another EB-2 NIW ( National Interest Waiver ) approval for a Physician Scientist in the Field of Molecular Biology ( Approval Notice ).
General Field: Molecular Biology
Position at the Time of Case Filing : Physician Scientist
Country of Origin: China
Country of Residence at the Time of Filing: China
Approval Notice Date: March 13 th , 2025
Processing Time: 27 days (Premium Processing Requested)
In a testament to the national importance of advanced biomedical research, the North America Immigration Law Group (NAILG) successfully secured an I-140 National Interest Waiver ( NIW ) approval for a distinguished expert in molecular biology. The petition, filed with direct premium processing, received a swift approval after 27 days, demonstrating the critical nature of the beneficiary's work.
Our client, who holds a Ph.D. in human medicine and specializes in molecular biology, is at the forefront of leveraging advanced computational methods and bioinformatics tools. Their proposed endeavor is focused on repurposing existing drugs for cancer treatment, aiming to enhance therapeutic options, improve patient outcomes, and significantly reduce drug development time and cost. This innovative approach addresses a pressing national need in healthcare, offering more accessible and efficient solutions for combating cancer.
To establish the client's significant contributions and the national interest served by their work, our legal team highlighted their impressive academic and professional achievements:
● Extensive Publication Record: The client has a notable publication record, including 8 peer-reviewed journal articles, 2 peer-reviewed conference articles, and 1 first-authored abstract.
● Influential Research: Their publications have been cited a total of 15 times, according to Google Scholar, underscoring the relevance and impact of their research within the scientific community.
By meticulously presenting the client's qualifications and the profound implications of their research, NAILG effectively demonstrated that waiving the job offer requirement was in the national interest. This rapid approval allows the client to continue their vital work in molecular biology, contributing to advancements in cancer treatment and ultimately improving public health in the United States.
--------------------------------------------
North America Immigration Law Group (Chen Immigration Law Associates) is a U.S. immigration law firm dedicated to representing corporations, research institutions, and individuals from all 50 U.S. states regarding I-140 immigration petitions. We specialize in employment-based immigration petition and have a proven record of high success rate for the categories of: EB2- NIW ( National Interest Waiver ), EB1-A ( Alien of Extraordinary Ability ), EB1-B (Outstanding Researcher/Professor) and O-1 ( Alien of Extraordinary Ability ).
Our Sixty-four Thousand I-140 Approvals Provide Unprecedented Insight into the USCIS Adjudication Trend
With nearly 64,000 EB-1A , EB-1B , EB-2 NIW and O-1 cases approved, we have first hand information on the manner in which the USCIS adjudicate I-140 cases. As the USCIS has constantly changed its adjudication standards for the EB-1A , EB-1B and EB-2 NIW categories, our firm's huge database of successful cases gives you unprecedented insight to USCIS adjudication trends. We carefully analyze the data for all of our cases and apply the results of our analyses toward giving our clients up-to-date advice and adapting our strategies such that we remain on par with the ever-shifting landscape of immigration law in the U.S. With us, you will always have access to important updates, strategies, and information so that you can make the most informed decisions about your case.
We Have Helped Tens of Thousands of Clients with Credentials and Backgrounds Similar to Yours
With our exceedingly large number of successful petitions, no matter what credentials you have, no matter your background and field of expertise, no matter your visa status or nationality, chances are we have helped hundreds or even thousands of clients just like you. Our clients are usually impressed with how well we understand their research and work. Our insight and understanding stems from the fact that we have handled many cases with elements similar to yours already, and this helps us devise the best strategies for each individual petition.
Vast Majority of Clients Came to Us Because of Referrals
For years, our firm has attracted new clients based solely on word of mouth, recommendations, and the positive collaboration experiences shared with them by their friends and family. We take pride in our reputation and work hard to ensure that we provide a green card application experience that our clients are happy to share with their friends and colleagues. That is how our cumulative total of approved cases grew from 600 in 2013 to nearly 64,000 in 2025.
